github-actions.description: Dependabot owns GitHub Actions updates (.github/dependabot.yml) — avoid duplicate PRs.

packageRules.description: Group non-major npm/catalog updates into a single PR to cut noise.
Held majors — kept back on purpose (see project memory / CLAUDE.md).

sharp — 0.x package, so a minor bump (0.34 -> 0.35) is a breaking change that Renovate mislabels as 'minor' and would otherwise slip past the held-major lock. Next.js's image pipeline depends on it. Lock minor AND major; only patch within the current 0.34.x is allowed.
Next.js pinned to 16.1.7 (16.2.x dev-server memory leak) — no updates.
Slidev held at 52.6.0 — 52.15+ ships Vite 8, which breaks the shared-asset symlinks in apps/slides.
vite-plus toolchain — bumped deliberately, not automatically.
